text:
GG0130G2_LWR_DRSNG_GOAL_CD GG0130G2 Discharge Goal Lower Dressing Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for dressing below the waist including fasteners, excluding footwear. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for dressing below the waist including fasteners, excluding footwear. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up
